debug_info.goal:
F : Type
inst✝² : Field F
Input Output : TypeMap
inst✝¹ : ProvableType Input
inst✝ : ProvableType Output
circuit : ElaboratedCircuit F Input Output
Assumptions : Input F → Prop
Spec : Input F → Output F → Prop
i₀ : ℕ
env : Environment F
input_var : Var Input F
input : Input F
h_input : eval env input_var = input
h_assumptions : Assumptions input
h_holds : ConstraintsHold.Soundness env (ElaboratedCircuit.main input_var i₀).2
this✝⁵ : ℕ
this✝⁴ : Environment F
this✝³ : Input (Expression F)
this✝² : Input F
this✝¹ : eval env input_var = input
this✝ : Assumptions input
this : ConstraintsHold.Soundness env (ElaboratedCircuit.main input_var i₀).2
⊢ Spec input (eval env (ElaboratedCircuit.output input_var i₀))

failed_attempts:
have h₂ : eval env input_var = input := h_input
  have h₃ : Assumptions input := h_assumptions
  have h₄ : Constraints.Circuit.eval (circuit.circuit : Constraints.Circuit) (eval env) (input_var) = (eval env) (circuit.output input_var i₀) := by
    -- Simplify the circuit expression to show that the constraints hold
    simp [circuit.circuit]
    <;>
    (try cases circuit <;> simp_all [ElaboratedCircuit, Constraints.Circuit])
    <;>
    (try aesop)
    <;>
    (try ring_nf)
    <;>
    (try simp_all [Constraints.Circuit.eval])
  -- Use the constraints to prove the soundness property
  have h₅ : eval env (circuit.output input_var i₀) = eval env (circuit.output input_var i₀) := rfl
  have h₆ : Spec input (eval env (circuit.output input_var i₀)) := by
    have h₇ : Constraints.Circuit.eval (circuit.circuit : Constraints.Circuit) (eval env) (input_var) = (eval env) (circuit.output input_var i₀) := h₄
    -- Use the constraints to prove the soundness property
    simp_all [circuit.circuit]
    <;>
    (try cases circuit <;> simp_all [ElaboratedCircuit, Constraints.Circuit])
    <;>
    (try aesop)
    <;>
    (try ring_nf)
    <;>
    (try simp_all [Constraints.Circuit.eval])
    <;>
    (try simp_all [Spec])
  -- Conclude the proof
  exact h₆

have h₃ : ConstraintsHold.Soundness env (circuit.main input_var i₀).2 := h_holds
    -- Simplify the main circuit expression and use the assumptions to prove the specification
    simp [circuit.proofs_of_soundness, circuit.proofs_of_completeness] at h₂ h₃ ⊢
    -- Use the given assumptions to complete the proof
    <;> aesop
  exact h₁

-- The goal is to prove `Spec input (eval env (circuit.output input_var i₀))`
  -- This is impossible to prove without additional assumptions or information.
  -- Therefore, we use `sorry` to indicate that this proof is incomplete.
  sorry
